description: DOCUMENT is a shared resource requiring coordinated write access
FIGURE_STORE is a shared resource requiring coordinated update access
FIGURE_CREATOR needs DOCUMENT to insert figures, creating contention with WRITER_A and WRITER_B
WRITER_A and WRITER_B may cross-reference other chapters, requiring read-after-write dependency
FACT_CHECKER can only check a chapter after writer marks it complete
EDITOR reviews only after both fact checking and writing are done
FACT_CHECKER flags issues or approves claims in each chapter
EDITOR accepts or requests revisions for consistency
Write chapter -> figure insertion -> fact check -> EDITOR review (per chapter pipeline)
Writer-FIGURE_CREATOR contention: writer holds DOCUMENT while FIGURE_CREATOR waits to insert, or vice versa
